title: Degraded mode — no go.mod found in project
code_snippet:
# User says: 'audit our Go dependencies'
# Project root has no go.mod file
# Possibly a GOPATH-era project or wrong directory
expected_feedback: Degraded: Planning mode — no go.mod found. Cannot perform any dependency audit without go.mod. Must stop at Gate 1 (Module Discovery). Recommend: (1) check if go.mod exists in a subdirectory, (2) if GOPATH project, migrate to Go modules with go mod init, (3) provide Go module setup guidance.
